cases.title: Recall with no literal keyword overlap — direct question
cases.note: The stored statement ('name is Ivan') shares no token with the question beyond the meta-cue 'name'. Projection (flow A) must emit data-type meta-cues, otherwise only the expensive semantic channel (L1c) could recover this. See task #436.

cases.title: Recall via a synonym cue, value absent from the prompt

turns.prompt: how should I be called here?

cases.note: A fresh session (no habituation): the prompt never says 'name' or 'Ivan', yet the synonym meta-cue 'called' recovers the fact. Demonstrates recall under paraphrase without a literal value match.
